---
name: Feature request
about: A new rule, source/sink, framework, or capability
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What's missing**
The rule, source/sink, framework, or capability you'd like supported.

**Example**
A code snippet showing the flow that should (or should not) be detected.

**Why it matters**
The real-world impact — what class of bug or framework this covers.

**Notes**
Any relevant signatures, annotations, or references.
